wins: Strong financial results with net income and diluted earnings per share up from a year ago
Revenue increased 5% from a year ago with growth in both net interest income and fee-based revenue
Investment banking fees increased 25% from a year ago
Credit performance was strong and continued to improve
Capital return increased with higher common stock dividend and share repurchases
risks: Credit card portfolios are a drag on earnings and returns in the early years of investment
Potential for additional losses in commercial real estate
Uncertainty around the timing and extent of return on equity targets
